title: crotalaria newtoniana
intro: Crotalaria newtoniana is a plant species known for its medicinal properties, belonging to the family Leguminosae. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Crotalaria newtoniana is commonly prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, with its herbal preparations being used to treat a range of health conditions.
